name: AMCON DISTRIBUTING CO
summary: AMCON Distributing Company, incorporated in Delaware in 1986 and listed on NYSE American (DIT), operates two segments: a wholesale distribution segment serving approximately 8,500 retail outlets in 34 states with over 20,000 consumer products including cigarettes, tobacco, candy, beverages, and groceries; and a retail health food segment operating 15 stores under Chamberlins Natural Foods, Akins Natural Foods, and Earth Origins Market banners throughout the Midwest and Florida.
